scores.correctness_notes: Response covers all events from the gold standard: lifecycle hooks (install, start, stop, remove, config-changed, upgrade-charm, update-status, collect-app-status, collect-unit-status), relation hooks (5 types), storage hooks (2 types), Pebble/container hooks (4 types including pebble-check-failed and pebble-check-recovered), secret hooks (4 types), leader hooks (2 types), and deprecated series upgrade hooks. Also mentions collect_metrics implicitly missing but all gold standard items are present.
